context_for_next_testing_agent: AI V2 Intelligence Layer verified. 5 new endpoints: (1) POST /api/ai/suggested-actions - Mission Control next actions, (2) POST /api/ai/pod-brief/{id} - Support Pod brief with status_signal + key_facts, (3) POST /api/ai/pod-actions/{id} - Pod AI actions, (4) POST /api/ai/program-insights - DIRECTOR-ONLY strategic insights with narrative + severity, (5) POST /api/ai/event-followups/{id} - Event follow-up suggestions. Coach Williams owns: athlete_1, athlete_2, athlete_3, athlete_5, athlete_7, etc. (NOT athlete_4). Event event_1 has notes for testing.
